description_long: This object is a robust guard stone set on a rectangular stone base, designed to serve as a protective barrier in urban environments. The main body is an irregularly shaped, roughly hewn stone with a natural, weathered appearance, and a metal plaque is affixed to its front face, featuring engraved text and a decorative motif. The stone is light gray, while the base is a speckled brownish granite, providing visual contrast and stability. The rear of the stone is unadorned and shows a rough, natural surface, while the sides reveal the thickness and solid construction of the stone. The plaque is metallic, likely bronze or brass, and is securely mounted to the stone. This guard stone is intended to prevent vehicle encroachment and may also serve a commemorative or historical function due to the presence of the plaque.
description: A large, irregular gray stone with a metal plaque on its front, mounted on a speckled granite base, serving as a protective and commemorative urban barrier.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved metal plaque and the full face of the guard stone atop its granite base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the stone and the protrusion of the plaque, with the granite base visible below.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned, rough surface of the stone and the granite base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stone's profile and the edge of the plaque, with the granite base beneath.
attribute_location: Typically placed at the edge of urban sidewalks, near street corners, driveway entrances, or adjacent to historical buildings to prevent vehicle intrusion and mark boundaries.
attribute_installation_orientation: Meant to be fully above ground, with the base resting flush on a paved or stone surface for stability.
attribute_wear_patterns: Likely to show chipping and smoothing on edges and corners from vehicle contact, as well as surface discoloration and erosion from prolonged exposure to weather. The plaque may exhibit tarnishing or patina due to oxidation.
attribute_historical_markings: A metal plaque with engraved text and a decorative motif is mounted on the front face of the stone, indicating commemorative or historical significance.
